DESCRIPTION:
Fire up the AppHost for local development (dotnet watch).

USAGE:
    forge fire [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    forge fire

OPTIONS:
                                  DEFAULT                                       
    -h, --help                               Prints help information            
    -v, --version                            Prints version information         
        --apphost-build-output                                                  
        --no-hot-reload                                                         
    -p, --port                    6969       Set the runtime port for the DCP   
                                             Integration host
